reviews.comment:
Increíble que esta altura no te puedan cobrar con débito
En las dos oportunidades que fui no tenían sistema, para mi fue una escusa para no hacerlo

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that at this point they can't accept debit cards. Both times I went, their system was down; to me, it was just an excuse not to accept them.

reviews.comment:
Una YPF como las de todo el país.... he visto mejores en ciudades mas grandes pero con la cordialidad y buena atención que los caracteriza.

(Translated by Google)
A YPF like the ones all over the country... I've seen better ones in bigger cities, but with the friendliness and good service that characterizes them.
